name: daily-news-digest
description: subhive (Claude Code で Web 制作を高速化する実用テンプレ屋) が提供する OSS Plugin。Generate a daily news digest in Markdown from any web/RSS sources you configure. Reads sources from news-sources.md, picks 1-5 items per day with selection criteria you define, deduplicates against the past 7 days, and writes a dated digest file. Pair with a scheduler (cron / Task Scheduler) for hands-off operation.
